raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta I. Nodalla.

N tas KUNGS aizi-
naja Mohsu/ un ruuna-
ja us to is tahs Sa-ee-
nas Telts/ tazzidams:

. Runna uhs Israëta Behr-
n/ un fakti uhs teem : Ja
dsZilweks no junis tam KUN-
GM weenn Uppuri grib up-
eht/ tad buhs jums jubfus
ontus peenest/ no Lohpeem/
Wehrscbeim/ un no fihkeem
peem.

. Ja winna Uppurs weens
dsams. Uppurs no Wehr-
em irr/ tad buhs tam weenu
hrftiti/ kas bes Wainas/ up-
ht/ preefsch tahs Sa-eefcha-
Telts Durwun buhs win-
to uppureht/ ka tas tam
NGAM labbi patihk.

Un tam buhs farvu Roh-
ta Dedsama-Uppura Gal-
ikt/ ka tas preefsch winnu
patizzigs effus/ winnu fa-
nadams.

Pehz to buhs winnam to
i Wehrftiti nokaut ta KUN-
Breefschâ/ un Aäroxa Deh-
teem Preesteruem buhs to
i uppureht/ un to Affini
rt to Altari flazziht/ kas
ch tahs Sa-eefchanas Telts
vim irr."
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad buhs winnam tam
Dedsaimam-Uppuram to Ahdu
noplehst/ un winnu Gabbalds
fakappaht.

7. Un ta Preestera Aärona
Dehleem/ buhsIlgguni us to Al-
tari kurt/ un Malku us to Ug-
guni lift.

8. Un Aärona Dehleem teem
Preestereem buhs tohs Gabba-
lus/ to Galwu un tohs Tawkus
us to Malku lift/ kas wirs to
Ugguni irr/ kas pa Altara Wir-
fu irr.

9. Tomehr winna Eekschas
un winna Kahjas buhs tam ar
Uhdeni masgaht/ un tam Pree-
steram buhs to winfu us to Al-
tari eededsinaht/ tas irr weens
Dedsams-Uppurs/ weens Ilg-
guns par faldu Sinarschn tam
KUNGAM.

10. Un ja winna Uppurs no
fihkeim Lohpeem irr/ no Awim/
jeb no Kasahm par Dedsamu-
Uppuri/ tad buhs tam weenu
Ahsiti/ kas bes Wainas/ up-
pureht.

11. Un winnam buhs to pee ta
Altara Sahneem prett Seennelt
nofant/ preefsch ta KUNGA/ un
Aärona Dehleem teem Preeste-
rein buhs winna Affint us to
Altari apkahrt flazziht.

12. Pehz to buhs winnam to
fawôsGabbalds pahrdalliht lihd
ar winna Galwu un winna Tan-
keem/ un tam Preesteram buhs to
us to Malku lift/ kas wirs to Ug-
guni/ kas pa Altara Wirfu irr."
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
